azure.name: Azure MCP Server
azure.description: Official Microsoft Azure MCP server — query and manage Azure resources using natural language via the Azure CLI under the hood

capabilities.resource_query: List and inspect Azure resources (App Services, SQL databases, storage accounts, etc.)
capabilities.app_service: Check App Service configuration, app settings, deployment slots, and health
capabilities.azure_sql: Query Azure SQL server and database properties
capabilities.blob_storage: Inspect Blob Storage accounts and containers
capabilities.entra_id: Query Entra ID app registrations and service principals
capabilities.subscription: List subscriptions, resource groups, and resource types

when_to_use: Verifying that Azure resources provisioned in IaC actually exist and are configured correctly
Checking App Service application settings (e.g. AzureAd__ClientId, connection strings) without logging into the portal
Confirming Managed Identity is enabled on the App Service (US-003)
Checking whether the app has been deployed (slot state, running status)
Verifying Azure SQL firewall rules or server-level settings
Inspecting Entra ID App Registration redirect URIs before testing auth flow
Investigating 'resource not found' issues on the live Azure URL
example_queries: List all App Services in my subscription
Is Managed Identity enabled on the App Service?
List redirect URIs on Entra ID app registration for AdsQuarterlyItReview
What is the status of the Azure SQL database AdsQuarterlyItReview?

prerequisites.auth: Azure CLI must be installed and logged in: `az login`
prerequisites.permissions: Contributor or Reader role on the target subscription/resource group

how_to_use.for_agents: Use Azure MCP to verify live Azure resource state. This is the fastest way to answer 'is the app deployed?', 'are the secrets set?', and 'why is the URL returning an error?' without opening the Azure portal.
how_to_use.for_humans: Requires `az login` to be run in the terminal before starting a Claude Code session. No additional API keys needed.
setup_instructions: Run `az login` and select the correct subscription
Run `az account set --subscription <name-or-id>` to target the right subscription
Node.js 18+ required for npx to fetch the package
